description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house with a white exterior, situated on a sloped brown terrain. The structure features a combination of flat and gable roofs, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. A spacious wooden deck extends from the rear, accessible by a set of stairs, and is supported by visible posts. The front facade includes a covered entryway, a garage, and a paved driveway, while the rear showcases a large outdoor living area. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, wood, and glass, with stone accents visible on one side. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level white house with large windows, a wooden deck, and a mix of flat and gable roofs, set on a sloped brown terrain. Features include a garage, paved driveway, and spacious outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, paved driveway, and a partial view of the deck and stone accent wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large wooden deck, stairs, and extensive windows opening to the outdoor living space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the deck, supporting posts, and the asymmetrical window arrangement along the house's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the sloped terrain, secondary entry, and additional outdoor space adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, a simple door, and a paved approach adjacent to the garage
